features: RELAXING & SOOTHING BATH SALTS: Nuage Vapour Bath Salts, expertly blended with soothing menthol, camphor and eucalyptus essential oil to help soothe stiff muscles, clear the mind and ease breathing

MUSCLE SOOTHING WITH MENTHOL: After a long day at work or an intense workout, these bath salts are your go-to for sore muscles. Menthol helps you to relax and relieve tension, giving your muscles the care they deserve while you unwind

INVIGORATING BATH SOAK EXPERIENCE: Add these bath salts to your foot spa for an indulgent pampering session. Just imagine relaxing at home, soaking your feet while the soothing scents of menthol and eucalyptus ease away the day’s stress

PERFECT FOR RELAXING EVENINGS: Whether it’s a rainy evening or a chilly night, these bath salts create a calming atmosphere. The warm, aromatic bath soak and bath steam invites you to breathe easy, allowing you to drift into a state of pure bliss as you relax in the tub

CONVENIENT AND EASY TO USE: Using these bath salts is a breeze! Simply add two handfuls to your bathwater, and watch as they dissolve into a soothing soak. It’s a quick and easy way to turn your bath into a luxurious escape without any hassle
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Nuage Bath Salts blended with soothing menthol, camphor and eucalyptus essential oil

GREAT FOR GIFT-GIVING: Looking for the perfect gift for a loved one? These bath salts make an ideal present for birthdays, holidays, or just because! They’re sure to bring joy and relaxation to anyone who needs a little TLC

RELAXATION WITH EVERY SOAK: The unique combination of menthol and eucalyptus in these bath salts helps you to relax and unwind. It’s like having a personal steam room, perfect for moments when you need to clear mind and enjoy a refreshing soak

PERFECT FOR SELF-CARE DAYS: Designate a day for yourself, light some candles, and run a warm bath with these luxurious salts. It’s the ultimate treat for the soul, ensuring you feel rejuvenated and pampered from head to toe

LUXURIOUS SPA EXPERIENCE AT HOME: Bring the spa experience home with Nuage Vapour Bath Salts. They provide a soothing escape from the everyday hustle and bustle, ensuring you leave your worries behind and step into a world of relaxation and bliss
description: Product Description Transform bath time into a blissful escape with Nuage Vapour Bath Salts, expertly crafted to bring comfort and relaxation right to your home. Infused with the refreshing scents of menthol, and eucalyptus essential oils, these bath salts are not just for pampering—they’re a self-care ritual that's essential to unwind. Ideal for cold winter days when you're not feeling your best. With each soak, the calming aromas envelop the senses, allowing stress and tension to melt away, leaving skin feeling soft and rejuvenated. Just imagine sinking into a warm bath after a long day, the soothing vapours gently lifting your spirits as you take deep, cooling breaths. They help make your skin feel fabulous - Perfect for chilly nights, these bath salts help create a tranquil atmosphere that encourages relaxation and wellness. Whether you're winding down after a busy day or seeking a peaceful moment during a self-care session, Nuage Vapour Bath Salts are the perfect companion for every bath. Ingredients Sodium Chloride, Menthol, Camphor, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Polysorbate 80, Linalool, Limonene. Directions Add a generous amount (approximately 2 handfuls) to warm, running bath water, for a wonderfully soothing & relaxing bath. Soak for at least 20 minutes to give the bath salts a chance to soften the skin and be absorbed. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
